zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Appleyard於1360年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親Bartholomew Appleyard26歲，母親Emma de Bumpsteade23歲。他於1393年與Lady Margaret Clere在英國諾福爾可諾維其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年9月4日在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Appleyard于1360年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其时，他的父亲Bartholomew Appleyard26岁，母亲Emma de Bumpsteade23岁。他于1393年与Lady Margaret Clere在英国諾福爾可諾維其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年9月4日在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Appleyard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic name for someone who lived by an apple orchard, Middle English appleyard, or a habitational name from Appleyard in Yorkshire with the same etymology. There are several places called with this term, of which the most significant as a source of surnames is in Yorkshire. It is also an Americanized form of Applegarth , which in Scandinavian-speaking areas replaced the native Appleton .

variants.name: Applegarth
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: topographic name from northern Middle English applegarth ‘apple orchard’ (Old Norse apaldr ‘apple tree’ + garthr ‘enclosure’), or a habitational name from a place so named, of which there are examples in Cumbria and North and East Yorkshire, as well as in the county of Dumfries.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Appleyard was born in 1360, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, his father, Bartholomew Appleyard, was 26 and his mother, Emma de Bumpsteade, was 23. He married Lady Margaret Clere in 1393, in Norwich, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 4 September 1419, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Appleyard est né en 1360, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew Appleyard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Emma de Bumpsteade, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Clere en 1393, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Appleyard 1360 in Norwich, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartholomew Appleyard 26 und seine Mutter Emma de Bumpsteade 23. Er hat 1393 in Norwich, Norfolk, England Lady Margaret Clere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 4. September 1419 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Appleyard è nato il nel 1360 nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Bartholomew Appleyard, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Bumpsteade, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Clere nel 1393, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 settembre 1419, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Appleyardが1360年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Appleyardは26歳，母Emma de Bumpsteadeは23歳であった。1393年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチでLady Margaret Clereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年9月4日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Appleyard(이)가 1360년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew Appleyard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Bumpsteade(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1393년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 Lady Margaret Clere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 9월 4일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Appleyard nasceu em 1360, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew Appleyard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Bumpsteade, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Clere em 1393, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1419, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Appleyard родился в 1360 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Bartholomew Appleyard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Bumpsteade, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Clere в 1393 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 4 сентября 1419 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Appleyard nació en 1360, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew Appleyard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Emma de Bumpsteade, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Clere en 1393, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1419, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
